interpretation: Raw prompt text remains the strongest measured MTP acceptance path on the two code prompts at D64.
Qwen chat-template thinking_off reduced MTP acceptance on code_python D64 and code_cpp D32, and code_cpp D64 failed exact-AR.
Qwen chat-template thinking_on was exact on both code prompts at D64 and beat thinking_off on the exact comparable rows, but still did not beat AR.
